heading: Replication
body:
| Commands           | Shell Method  | Privilege Actions  |
| ------------------ | ------------- | ------------------ |
| replSetFreeze      | rs.freeze()   | replSetStateChange |
| replSetInitiate    | rs.initiate() |                    |
| replSetMaintenance |               | replSetStateChange |
| replSetReconfig    | rs.reconfig() |                    |
| replSetResizeOplog |               |                    |
| replSetStepDown    | rs.stepDown() | replSetStateChange |
| replSetSyncFrom    | rs.syncFrom() | replSetStateChange |
| resync             |               | resync             |
